Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}So, you know how it was my birthday the other day?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 110 1 25 25}Well, guess what! Mom and Dad both remembered![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 13 13 15 110}Yeah! They were smiling and happy and everything![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I got so many presents! I even got a birthday cake![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 110 0 25 25}It's been so long since we ate together as a family.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}How come Mom and Dad don't get along anymore?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}If I know why, I can fix it and make it all better![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I'm gonna make Mom and Dad happy again![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After saying goodbye to Maiko,[n]I headed back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
